# SSH 双向同步 (冲突策略)
# 替换 YOUR_HOST / YOUR_PASSWORD 为实际值后运行
#
# 冲突时本地覆盖 (local_wins)
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "sync", "direction": "bidirectional", "local_path": "./config", "remote_path": "/opt/app/config", "recursive": true, "conflict": "local_wins"}
aitk SSH_

# 冲突时远程覆盖 (remote_wins)
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "sync", "direction": "bidirectional", "local_path": "./config", "remote_path": "/opt/app/config", "recursive": true, "conflict": "remote_wins"}
aitk SSH_

# 冲突时新的覆盖 (newer_wins)
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "sync", "direction": "bidirectional", "local_path": "./config", "remote_path": "/opt/app/config", "recursive": true, "conflict": "newer_wins"}
aitk SSH_

# 冲突时报告错误不覆盖 (fail_on_conflict，默认)
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "sync", "direction": "bidirectional", "local_path": "./config", "remote_path": "/opt/app/config", "recursive": true, "conflict": "fail_on_conflict"}
aitk SSH_
